name: OMC25
curator: Meta FAIR-Chem (Gharakhanyan, Barroso-Luque, Marom, Ulissi, Sriram et al.)
size: >27M molecular-crystal structures (12 elements, up to 300 atoms per cell) from PBE+D3 relaxation trajectories of ~230k crystals built from ~50k OE62 molecules
primaryPaper: Gharakhanyan et al., Open Molecular Crystals 2025 (OMC25) Dataset and Models, arXiv:2508.02651 (2025).
howToGet: Gated download on Hugging Face at facebook/OMC25 (CC-BY 4.0, access request required); provided as ASE-DB lmdb files.
